title: Support Paivapo
description: We rely on donations to build the collection and maintain the space.
money_description: Financial donations go towards books, space maintenance, and community programmes.
book_description: Buy a book from our wishlist. It is delivered to our London collection point and shipped to Zimbabwe.

how_items.title: Books
how_items.text: Acquiring titles across art, ecology, and literature.

how_items.title: Space
how_items.text: Maintaining the reading room and gathering area in Harare.

how_items.title: Programmes
how_items.text: Reading groups, workshops, and cultural events open to all.

charity_note: Donations are currently processed through our studio account. UK charity registration is in progress. For questions about donations, contact hello@paivapo.org.
